payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Dark reddish-brown mahogany chair with an ornate pierced and carved back splat and polished glossy finish; wooden seat and front legs are visible but the lower base is slightly edge-cropped in the image — appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.
